zh.Ashwell, Hertfordshire, England: 英國賀特福爾阿申維爾
zh.Westmill, Hertfordshire, England: 英國英格蘭賀特福爾維斯特米爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Duxford於1541年出生在英國賀特福爾阿申維爾時，他的父親John Duxford32歲，母親Lady Agnes Durd26歲。他於1561年與Joan在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1622年4月23日在英國賀特福爾維斯特米爾享年81歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀特福爾維斯特米爾。

zh-hans.Ashwell, Hertfordshire, England: 英国賀特福爾阿申維爾
zh-hans.Westmill, Hertfordshire, England: 英国英格兰賀特福爾維斯特米爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Duxford于1541年出生在英国賀特福爾阿申維爾时，他的父亲John Duxford32岁，母亲Lady Agnes Durd26岁。他于1561年与Joan在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1622年4月23日在英国賀特福爾維斯特米爾享年81岁，埋葬在英国英格兰賀特福爾維斯特米爾。

nameMeanings.name: Duxford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Huxford in King's Nympton (Devon), from the Old English personal name Hōc (genitive Hōces) or Old English hōc ‘hook, angle, bend in a river’ (genitive hōces) + ford.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Duxford was born in 1541, in Ashwell, Hertfordshire, England, his father, John Duxford, was 32 and his mother, Lady Agnes Durd, was 26. He married Joan in 1561, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 23 April 1622, in Westmill, Hertfordshire, England, at the age of 81, and was buried in Westmill, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Duxford est né en 1541, à Ashwell, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, son père, John Duxford, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Lady Agnes Durd, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Joan en 1561, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 23 avril 1622, à Westmill, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterré à Westmill, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Duxford 1541 in Ashwell, Hertfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Duxford 32 und seine Mutter Lady Agnes Durd 26. Er hat 1561 in England, United Kingdom Joan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 23. April 1622 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Westmill, Hertfordshire, England und wurde in Westmill, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Duxford è nato il nel 1541 nel Ashwell, Hertfordshire, England, il suo padre, John Duxford, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Lady Agnes Durd, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Joan nel 1561, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 23 aprile 1622, nel Westmill, Hertfordshire, England, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolto a Westmill, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Westmill, Hertfordshire, England: イギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアウエストミル
ja.lifeSummary: Richard Duxfordが1541年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアアシュウエルで生まれた時，父John Duxfordは32歳，母Lady Agnes Durdは26歳であった。1561年にイギリスイギリスでJoanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1622年4月23日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアウエストミルで81歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアウエストミルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Duxford(이)가 1541년 영국 허트퍼드실르 애스h웰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Duxford(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Agnes Durd(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1561년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Joan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1622년 4월 23일 영국 허트퍼드실르 웨스트미에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 웨스트미에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Duxford nasceu em 1541, em Ashwell, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Duxford, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Lady Agnes Durd, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan em 1561, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 23 de abril de 1622, em Westmill, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, com 81 anos, e foi sepultado em Westmill, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Duxford родился в 1541 г. в местности ашвелл, хиртфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Duxford было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Agnes Durd, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan в 1561 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 23 апреля 1622 г. в местности вестмилл, хиртфордшир, Англия в возрасте 81 год и был похоронен в местности вестмилл, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Duxford nació en 1541, en Ashwell, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Duxford, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Lady Agnes Durd, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Joan en 1561, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 23 de abril de 1622, en Westmill, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 81 años, y fue sepultado en Westmill, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
